description: Pacing de producción - Plan vs Real

targets.rawSql:
WITH Start_Sec AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(erp.id), (SELECT MIN(id) FROM JAULA_ERP WHERE fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112))) AS Last_ERP_ID
    FROM JAULA_ERP erp
    INNER JOIN LOG_TABLA log ON log.NSECUENCIA = erp.secuencia AND log.FECHA_MONTAJE = erp.fecha_montaje
    WHERE log.fecha_creacion < DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND log.OK_NOK = 'OK'
),
Sec_Today AS (
    SELECT TOP 2000
        id,
        COALESCE((tpo_elevac_max + tpo_descenso_max + tpo_elev_max_scarga + tpo_desc_max_scarga)/100.0, 20.0) AS cycle_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS seq_idx
    FROM JAULA_ERP
    WHERE id >= (SELECT Last_ERP_ID + 18 FROM Start_Sec)
    ORDER BY id
),
Cumulative_Plan AS (
    SELECT
        seq_idx,
        SUM(cycle_time) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_seconds
    FROM Sec_Today
)
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(seq_idx), 0) AS [Teórico]
FROM Cumulative_Plan
WHERE DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END

SELECT COUNT(*) AS [Real]
FROM LOG_TABLA
WHERE fecha_creacion >= DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
  AND fecha_creacion <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END
  AND OK_NOK = 'OK'

WITH Start_Sec AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(erp.id), (SELECT MIN(id) FROM JAULA_ERP WHERE fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112))) AS Last_ERP_ID
    FROM JAULA_ERP erp
    INNER JOIN LOG_TABLA log ON log.NSECUENCIA = erp.secuencia AND log.FECHA_MONTAJE = erp.fecha_montaje
    WHERE log.fecha_creacion < DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND log.OK_NOK = 'OK'
),
Sec_Today AS (
    SELECT TOP 2000
        id,
        COALESCE((tpo_elevac_max + tpo_descenso_max + tpo_elev_max_scarga + tpo_desc_max_scarga)/100.0, 20.0) AS cycle_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS seq_idx
    FROM JAULA_ERP
    WHERE id >= (SELECT Last_ERP_ID + 18 FROM Start_Sec)
    ORDER BY id
),
Cumulative_Plan AS (
    SELECT
        seq_idx,
        SUM(cycle_time) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_seconds
    FROM Sec_Today
),
Teorico_Count AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(seq_idx), 0) AS teorico
    FROM Cumulative_Plan
    WHERE DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END
),
Real_Count AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS real
    FROM LOG_TABLA
    WHERE fecha_creacion >= DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND fecha_creacion <= CASE WHEN $__timeTo() > GETUTCDATE() THEN GETUTCDATE() ELSE $__timeTo() END
      AND OK_NOK = 'OK'
)
SELECT 
    r.real - t.teorico AS [Desviación]
FROM Real_Count r, Teorico_Count t

WITH Start_Sec AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(erp.id), (SELECT MIN(id) FROM JAULA_ERP WHERE fecha_montaje = CONVERT(varchar(8), CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE), 112))) AS Last_ERP_ID
    FROM JAULA_ERP erp
    INNER JOIN LOG_TABLA log ON log.NSECUENCIA = erp.secuencia AND log.FECHA_MONTAJE = erp.fecha_montaje
    WHERE log.fecha_creacion < DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND log.OK_NOK = 'OK'
),
Sec_Today AS (
    SELECT TOP 2000
        id,
        secuencia,
        modelo,
        COALESCE((tpo_elevac_max + tpo_descenso_max + tpo_elev_max_scarga + tpo_desc_max_scarga)/100.0, 20.0) AS cycle_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS seq_idx
    FROM JAULA_ERP
    WHERE id >= (SELECT Last_ERP_ID + 18 FROM Start_Sec)
    ORDER BY id
),
Cumulative_Plan AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        secuencia,
        modelo,
        cycle_time,
        seq_idx,
        SUM(cycle_time) OVER (ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS cum_seconds
    FROM Sec_Today
)
SELECT time, [Teórico] FROM (
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME)) AS time,
        0 AS [Teórico]
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) AS time,
        seq_idx AS [Teórico]
    FROM Cumulative_Plan
    WHERE DATEADD(second, CAST(cum_seconds AS INT), DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))) <= $__timeTo()
) t
ORDER BY time

SELECT time, [Real] FROM (
    SELECT 
        DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME)) AS time,
        0 AS [Real]
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        fecha_creacion AS time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY fecha_creacion) AS [Real]
    FROM LOG_TABLA
    WHERE fecha_creacion >= DATEADD(hour, 6, CAST(CAST($__timeFrom() AS DATE) AS DATETIME))
      AND fecha_creacion <= $__timeTo()
      AND OK_NOK = 'OK'
) t
ORDER BY time

panels.title: EVOLUCIÓN PLAN DE PRODUCCIÓN (PLAN vs REAL)

title: PLAN PRODUCCIÓN
